UpdateBlbTcpListener.listenerPort: Port of the listener to update, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
UpdateBlbTcpListener.backendPort: Listening port of the backend server, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
UpdateBlbTcpListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports three options: "RoundRobin" / "LeastConnection" / "Hash", where "RoundRobin" means weighted round robin, "LeastConnection" means least connections, and "Hash" means source IP hash
UpdateBlbTcpListener.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout in seconds, default is 3, must be an integer between 1 and 60
UpdateBlbTcpListener.healthCheckInterval: Health check interval in seconds, default is 3, must be an integer between 1 and 10
UpdateBlbTcpListener.unhealthyThreshold: Unhealthy threshold, i.e., the number of consecutive failed health checks after which the backend server is blocked; default is 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateBlbTcpListener.healthyThreshold: Healthy threshold, i.e., the number of consecutive successful health checks after which the backend server is restored to available; default is 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
